name: SavedItemChangedAction
summary: Describes the action that caused a changed event for a SavedItemCollection-based Document part.

enum_values.name: Add
enum_values.summary: An item was added or inserted

enum_values.name: Move
enum_values.summary: An item was moved within the SavedItem hierarchy

enum_values.name: Edit
enum_values.summary: An item was edited within the SavedItem hierarchy

enum_values.name: Reset
enum_values.summary: The contents of the Document part have changed dramatically
